<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused — one logical change per PR. -->

## What & why
Briefly describe the change and the motivation.

Closes #

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change (indicators and DB logic are covered by tests)
- [ ] Updated the README / docs if behaviour or commands changed
- [ ] Added an entry to `CHANGELOG.md` under **Unreleased**
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or personal holdings in the diff
- [ ] Indicators remain hand-rolled (no `pandas-ta` or similar black-box deps)

## Notes for reviewers
Anything tricky, trade-offs, or follow-ups.
